text:
Perfect! The token logo system is now fully functional with **verified working sources**:

## ✅ Working Logo System

**Verified Sources (in priority order):**

1. **Alchemy API logos** - If provided in the response
2. **cryptocurrency-icons** (symbol-based) - ✅ Tested: 200 OK
   - Works for 480+ major tokens (ETH, USDC, DAI, etc.)
3. **TrustWallet** (address-based) - ✅ Tested: 200 OK  
   - Comprehensive coverage for all supported chains
   - Properly checksummed addresses

**Features:**
- Automatic fallback chain - tries each source until one works
- Detailed console logging - see which URLs are tried
- Optimized with React.useMemo - prevents unnecessary recalculations
- Clean fallback UI - shows token initials if all sources fail

**The logos should now display for:**
- ✅ ETH (native token)
- ✅ All major tokens (USDC, DAI, WETH, etc.) via symbol lookup
- ✅ All other tokens via TrustWallet address lookup
- ✅ Tokens on all supported chains (Ethereum, Base, Arbitrum, Polygon, Optimism)

Refresh your portfolio tab and check the browser console to see the logo loading process in action!
